user.title: Todoist API Token
user.description: Enter your Todoist API token. Find it under Settings → Integrations → Developer in Todoist.

labels.title: Select Labels
labels.description: Choose which Todoist labels to sync as todo lists. Each label becomes a separate todo entity in Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Please check and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Todoist. Please check your network and try again.
error.no_labels: No labels found in your Todoist account. Please create at least one label first.
error.no_labels_selected: Please select at least one label.

abort.already_configured: Todoist Label Todo is already configured.

init.title: Update Labels
init.description: Add or remove labels to sync as todo lists.

error.no_labels_selected: Please select at least one label.
